savedHustles.title: Saved Side Hustles
savedHustles.description: A side hustle saved by a user to their account dashboard

userId.description: The unique identifier of the user who saved the hustle

hustleId.description: The unique ID of the saved side hustle idea

createdAt.description: The date and time when the hustle was saved

plans.title: Shared Plans
plans.description: A shared dynamic action plan saved for deep linking and social sharing

answers.description: The answers and options selected by the user in the survey

createdAt.description: Timestamp when this plan was created

/savedHustles/{savedHustleId}.description: Collection of saved side hustles mapped per user

/plans/{planId}.description: Collection of plan sharing deep links
